# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed.

## Type

- [ ] Website content
- [ ] WordPress setup
- [ ] Supabase backend
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Branding
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Security update

## Checklist

- [ ] No passwords or secrets added
- [ ] Arabic text displays correctly
- [ ] Files are in the correct folder
- [ ] README or docs updated if needed
